channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: Hungary After Orbán: The Hard Road Back to Democracy
item.description: The road back to democracy from authoritarianism is a difficult one, filled with fits and starts that thwart even the best attempts; Hungary holds some lessons for others trying to walk that path back to democracy.

item.title: The Iranian Cyber Threat to U.S. Critical Infrastructure
item.description: U.S. agencies warn of Iranian cyber threats to critical infrastructure. This piece examines the cyber dimension of the U.S.-Iran conflict and U.S. cybersecurity's broader vulnerabilities—as kinetic war wages overseas, the homeland remains exposed.

item.title: A New Phase for the U.S. Battery Industry
item.description: U.S. battery manufacturing is at a critical inflection point just as the industry becomes increasingly central to energy priorities. This report examines key dynamics shaping the U.S. battery value chain and discusses strategies to address its most pressing needs.
